title: Build n' Bake
description: This pack is designed for my own server and friends, but I am posting it here for both ease of access for my friends and for those who enjoy a little bit of everything whilst keeping the feel of vanilla Minecraft.
body:
This pack is designed for my own server and friends, but I am posting it here for both ease of access for my friends and for those who enjoy a little bit of everything whilst keeping the feel of vanilla Minecraft.

 

In this mod pack you can build structures to rival Rome, complex contraptions, and Redstone creations, or be the humble farmer, and so much more. Explore the vast world and conquer all those who oppose you whilst looking positively dashing. Everything here is how I imagine Minecraft from the world generation to the survival aspects, to the Redstone and intricate contraptions and automation. You can tweak and tune all the little knobs and dials to suit your needs. Every mod was hand selected for a special type of experience that I envisioned for my grand plans.
